title: Why the world’s best-performing stock market this year fell into bear territory
summary_full: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.
summary_public: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.
